g.text: I needed a new bag, of course—what a great excuse to buy a
new camera bag, and also go all the way to south bombay. I
was staying with my best friend, my partner and the most
awesome Mouse (Mousami). So I didn’t have an immense
amount of guilt every single day I didn’t have an internship,
because I didn’t have to pay rent.
Ahh, th local during th sunset, a golden lif spread in
every tiny crevic. Every singl breath as fresh and humid as
It took me an hour to reach Chatrapati Shivaji Maharaj
Terminus; that’s a mouthful so it’s just going to be CSMT
from now on, or CST even. I stood at the mouth of the
coach, letting it breathe in all the air—and exhale it all out. I
walked to reach “Camera Gully”, a very intuitively named
